title: More Mob Variants Passive Edition
description: A modified version of MMV that doesn't have hostile mob variants.
body:
# More Mob Variants Passive Edition
____________________________________
A little modification of [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants) by [nyuppo](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nyuppo) that completely disables the hostile mob variants, making it compatible with other mods or resourcepacks that change hostile mob textures or behaviour.

When used with **Mobs Refreshed**:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a8cdcc82c5ee9ac7cdf57fc40f7a2504401016b.png)

</details>




More Mob Variants description:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### üìñ  **About**

Recent mobs that have been added to the game all have plenty of fun variants to look at, but what about the old ones?
  

This mod adds new variants to the older mobs that all look the same, to make them a little more fresh.


Variants are added through NBT, meaning that they will be persistent across all players.


All variants and features are data-driven, allowing for full customization through datapacks.


### üí° **Installation**

This mod has to be installed server-side and client-side, although clients without the mod can still join servers with the mod.


### üìÅ **Features**

In addition to the default texture, the mod currently features the following new variants:

 ‚Äé  ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Äé  ‚Äé ‚Ä¢ Cat

        Gray Tabby

        Doug

        Handsome

        Tortoiseshell


‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Äé‚Äé‚Ä¢ Chicken

        Amber

        Bronzed

        Gold Crested

        Midnight

        Skewbald

        Stormy

        Skeleton (if spawned in the nether)

        Duck (rare)


‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Ä¢ Cow

        Ashen

        Cream

        Cookie

        Dairy

        Pinto

        Sunset

        Umbra

        Wooly

        Albino (rare, spawns in taigas)


 ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Ä¢ Pig (all variants can be muddy)

        Mottled

        Piebald

        Pink Footed

        Sooty

        Spotted


 ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Ä¢ Sheep (all variants can have horns)

        Fuzzy

        Patched

        Rocky

        Inky

        Long-nosed


  ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Ä¢ Wolf

        All default variants from 1.20.5

        Basenji (jupiter + golden retriever, or rusty + ashen)

        French Bulldog (husky + golden retriever, or rusty + golden retriever)

        German Shepherd (jupiter + husky, or woods + chestnut)

        Golden Retriever (jupiter + pale (default), or rusty + pale (default))

        Husky (black + ashen, or snowy + ashen)

        Jupiter (rusty + woods, or striped + woods)

        Skeleton (breeding in nether)

        White Terrier


</details>
